summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a legendary Fillmore night featuring guest stars, an acoustic set with Phil on electric bass, and Jerry’s piano on “To Lay Me Down”.
review: All three reviewers rave about this recording, calling it peer‑less and beautifully cleaned up. The show is remembered as one of the greatest, highlighted by special guests (Nelson, Grisman), an acoustic set with Phil Lesh switching to electric bass, and Jerry Garcia’s rare piano work on “To Lay Me Down”. The soundboard source has been meticulously restored, delivering crystal‑clear audio throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews praise both the performance (legendary Fillmore show with guest appearances) and the pristine, expertly restored soundboard recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Cleaned up by the community; described as beautiful, amazing, and a peer‑less listening experience with no reported flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Highly praised overall – memorable night with guest artists, an acoustic set enhanced by Phil’s electric bass, and unique moments like Jerry on piano; reviewers suggest the entire Fillmore run was superb.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted for playing piano on “To Lay Me Down” and generally praised for his performance.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned adding electric bass to the acoustic set, a memorable highlight.
